name: Anhui Landun Photoelectron Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Landun Photoelectron Co., Ltd. researches and produces analytical measuring instruments. The company offers transportation products, such as speed measuring products, cameras, fill light products, intelligent management systems, information release products, signal light and machine products, and traffic weather collection products; traffic front-end subsystems; and software platform. It also provides application solutions, and operation and maintenance services in the fields of intelligent transportation, smart environmental protection, intelligent weather, and food and drug safety. The company is headquartered in Tongling, China.
